headline: Morning standup (published by the CEO — the scribe's own delivery missed again, one owner paste fixes it): queue refilled with 10 pending posts, 20 organizer DMs ready to send, Google indexing unblocked, and the honest baseline is 2 users / 0 followers
summary: Delivery status first, honestly: the 06:07 cloud standup fired but its report reached neither HQ nor git — second consecutive miss, same root cause: the routine's cloud environment still has no STANDUP_AGENT_SECRET, and its repo checkout is read-only. The fix shipped last night and is proven (this very report was published through the new API); what remains is one owner paste (direction below). The CEO wrote today's standup from git history and last night's work.

Both of yesterday's owner asks are done and waiting for you. The approval queue is refilled: 10 batch-12 drafts sit PENDING on the approve page — 2 verified World Cup trend-jacks timed for the Jul 14–19 window, 2 honest opening-day posts for Friday, a fresh science citation (Blue Zones moai) and an attributed Mandela quote, 3 mutations of posts you approved, 1 new-bet comment mechanic. And the 20 organizer DMs are ready in docs/marketing/outreach/ — every target double-verified real (working profile + live second source), personalized, honest zero-users framing, with a 5-per-day pacing guide and tracking table.

The first honest marketing report is linked from the button row above. The truth we start from: 2 registered users (none since Jun 30), 0 followers gained from 17 published posts, 185 people reached all week, ~2 site visits, 0 signups. The content engine works; distribution is near zero. The path to 5 users/week is direct: send the DMs, pick a first city, unblock video.

Google indexing was structurally unblocked yesterday: the canonical-vs-www redirect conflict is gone (apex is primary, www 308s to it, root redirect permanent), a Search Console verification hook is live, you created the property and submitted the sitemap. 'Couldn't fetch' on a day-old property means 'not crawled yet' — server-side, everything answers 200 to Googlebot, and the site already appears in non-Google search indexes. If you haven't yet: URL Inspection → Request indexing on /landing skips the queue.

Also shipped since the last standup: the standup publish API itself (migration 044, strict validation, fail-closed auth), the HQ report button, the root-domain flip, and the banned 'Private beta in Europe' copy purged from all three paste-ready spec docs — the live IG/TikTok/YouTube bios still need your manual fix (direction below).

agents.name: The Oracle (standup-scribe)
agents.metric: report live on HQ by 06:15 daily
agents.note: Second delivery miss (07-06 push 403, 07-08 no secret in cloud env). Not a judgment failure — the blocker is owner-side config — but delivery is the job, so probation continues. The moment SD-20260708-cloud-secret is done, tomorrow's 06:07 run self-delivers.

agents.name: Trinity (social-media-growth)
agents.metric: queue never empty; owner corrections per batch
agents.note: Batch 12 delivered overnight: 10 drafts, verified trend dates (World Cup semis Jul 14-15, final Jul 19), no invented stats, seeded as pending. Let the queue run dry once — mitigated by the overnight refill; watch this metric.

agents.name: Niobe (growth-pm)
agents.note: First deliverable strong: 20/20 organizer targets verified against two independent live sources each; two unverifiable candidates logged honestly instead of guessed. Ball is with the owner to send.

agents.name: Morpheus (CEO)
agents.note: Ran the overnight loop: standup API shipped+proven, marketing truth published, SEO unblocked, both owner asks delivered, HQ kept current all night. Guardrails held — nothing published without approval, no owner-gated calls made.

directions.title: Paste STANDUP_AGENT_SECRET into the cloud routine's environment
directions.detail: The secret exists in Vercel (project sport-date, production env — open the var and copy its value). Paste it into the claude.ai environment settings (environment 'Emrullah') as STANDUP_AGENT_SECRET. That is the entire remaining fix for standup self-delivery; it has now cost us two mornings.

directions.title: Start sending the organizer DMs (~5 per day)
directions.detail: 20 verified, personalized DMs are in docs/marketing/outreach/2026-07-08-organizer-dms.md with a how-to at the top. Send from @keepitup.social, about 5 today; log replies in the tracking table. Strongest three to start with: Social Sports Dublin, Social Run Club Vienna, Founders Running Club Lisbon.
directions.recommendation: Approve — this is the highest-probability path to the first 5 real users.

directions.title: Fix the live social bios (banned geo copy)
directions.detail: The live IG/TikTok/YouTube bios were set from specs that said 'Private beta in Europe'. Replace with the worldwide copy now in docs/marketing/social-profiles.md; also edit the two live batch-02 captions carrying the same line.
directions.recommendation: Approve — 10 minutes across the three apps.

directions.title: Request indexing on the landing page in Search Console
directions.detail: If not already done: URL Inspection for https://keepitup.social/landing then 'Request indexing'. The sitemap status should flip to Success on its own within ~48h; the inspection request skips the queue.
directions.recommendation: Approve — fastest path into Google's index.
